sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) i.q. the preceding No. 1, ice, poet. used of hail, Psa 147:17.

(2) [Korah], pr.n.-(a) of a son of Esau, Gen 36:5, 14 Gen 36:14.-(b) of a son of Eliphaz, and of an Edomite tribe sprung from him, ibid. verse 16.-(c) of a Levite who conspired against Moses, Exo 6:21 Num 16:1, seqq. of the same family are בְּנֵי קֹרַח Korahites, Levites and singers in the time of David (see קָרְחִי ), to whom ten of the Psalms are ascribed, Psa 42:1-11 ( 43 )- 49 , 84 , 85 , 87 , 88 .-(d) 1Ch 2:43.
